zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Greene於1436年出生在英國史洛普爾布利其諾斯時，她的父親Walter Greene26歲，母親Elizabeth Warner22歲。她於1450年與John Le Barker在英國史洛普爾可拉維利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1495年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾可拉維利享年59歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾可拉維利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Greene于1436年出生在英国史洛普爾布利其諾斯时，她的父亲Walter Greene26岁，母亲Elizabeth Warner22岁。她于1450年与John Le Barker在英国史洛普爾可拉維利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1495年在英国英格兰史洛普爾可拉維利享年59岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾可拉維利。

nameMeanings.name: Greene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Green  . In North America, this surname has assimilated cognates from other languages.

variants.name: Green
meanings: English: either a nickname for someone who was fond of dressing in this color (Old English grēne) or was young or immature, or who had played the part of the ‘Green Man’ in the May Day celebrations, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a village green (Middle English grene, a transferred use of the color term). This is one of the most common and widespread of English surnames. In North America it has assimilated cognates from other languages, notably German Grün (see Gruen ) and Dutch Groen ; compare 7 below. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: alternatively, from a Middle English personal name Grene.
Irish: adopted for Ó hUainín ‘descendant of Uainín’, a personal name from a pet form of uaine ‘green’, see Honan .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Greene was born in 1436, in Bridgnorth, Shropshire, England, her father, Walter Greene, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth Warner, was 22. She married John Le Barker in 1450, in Claverley, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1495, in Claverley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Claverley, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Greene est née en 1436, à Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter Greene, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Warner, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Le Barker en 1450, à Claverley, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1495, à Claverley, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Claverley, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Greene 1436 in Bridgnorth, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Greene 26 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Warner 22. Sie hat 1450 in Claverley, Shropshire, England John Le Barker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1495 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Claverley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Claverley, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Greene è nata il nel 1436 nel Bridgnorth, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Walter Greene, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Warner, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John Le Barker nel 1450, nel Claverley, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1495, nel Claverley, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Claverley, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Greeneが1436年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブリドグノースで生まれた時，父Walter Greeneは26歳，母Elizabeth Warnerは22歳であった。1450年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアクラバーリーでJohn Le Barkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1495年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアクラバーリーで59歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアクラバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Greene(이)가 1436년 영국 슈럽실르 브리지노르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Greene(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Warner(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1450년 영국 슈럽실르 클레이벌리에서 John Le Barker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1495년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 클레이벌리에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 클레이벌리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Greene nasceu em 1436, em Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Greene, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Warner, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John Le Barker em 1450, em Claverley, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1495, em Claverley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Claverley, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Greene родилась в 1436 г. в местности бриджнорт, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter Greene было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Warner, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Le Barker в 1450 г. в местности клавирли, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1495 г. в местности клавирли, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности клавирли, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Greene nació en 1436, en Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Greene, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Warner, tenía 22 años. Se casó con John Le Barker en 1450, en Claverley, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1495, en Claverley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Claverley, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
